title: polyscias sandwicensis
intro: Polyscias sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian holly or ou, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves of the Polyscias sandwicensis plant have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Additionally, the plant's leaves have been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
